textByHash.f7fd778456a8d58178552d1bebab1109d75cff6c: Greetings I am Hassan, Chancellor to the Emir of Al- Kharid.
textByHash.a264dd18dc25853e5511d629fcc40b62dbe1765b: I need the services of someone, yes. If you are interested, see the spymaster, Osman. I manage the finances here. Come to me when you need payment.
textByHash.adb558f2629256b2416905acd7e22ff56ae125ea: Have you found the spymaster, Osman, yet? You cannot proceed in your task without reporting to him.
textByHash.cae70df32b8b763dade58ffa6b6e1668eed1fb17: I understand the Spymaster has hired you. I will pay the reward only when the Prince is rescued.
textByHash.62fc80f40d6d46743065be9b6f2670cd7cc5983f: You have the eternal gratitude of the Emir for rescuing his son. I am authorised to pay you 700 coins.
textByHash.0ff3f8888ef366cb850a15e0914e7ad12bd3c048: Hey, do not treat the Emir's palace like a climbing frame for children, whoever you are!
textByHash.750308a9930c41ef10ab148fdc514beb874ec5e1: Hey, while you have our gratitude for saving the prince, you must earn our trust more fully before the Emir will tolerate you climbing through his windows like a thief!
textByHash.18410c295a32ef3a465907b3b3baeef2bb0ae64c: We manage, in our humble way. We are a wealthy town and we have water. It cures many thirsts.
textByHash.aa2c6efd256fd23b8c06d6042b6a6b7b2640e606: You are welcome. They are not expensive. We have them here to stop the elite guard being bothered. They are a little harder to kill.
textByHash.2df1a78a3dac0d98328b0004c7eaac18704c6b6b: You are a friend of the town of Al-Kharid. If we have more tasks to complete, we will ask you. Please, keep in contact. Good employees are not easy to find.
